name: Genshin Impact RPG
description:
120,000+ TOKENS | 250 UNIQUE ENTRIES

// ACCESSING WORLD STATE: TEYVAT + NOD-KRAI EXPANSION //

ATTENTION!!! WHAT IS STATED BELOW IS NOT A GOOD ENOUGH JUSTIFICATION OF THE BOT AND THE LOREBOOK USED!!!! EXPECT MORE THAN WHAT IS STATED!!! DO NOT JUDGE A BOOK BY THE COVER!!!

EVERYONE IS AGED UP BY THE WAY!!!

This is a lore archive, not a game. You are accessing the most dense, technically comprehensive simulation of the Genshin Impact universe available. This system does not rely on vague storytelling; it runs on a 120,000-token logic core that indexes every character biography, nation history, and hidden faction detailed in the game files up to Version 6. X.

The simulation includes the complete geopolitical landscape of the Seven Nations, the submerged history of Remuria, the tribal warfare of Natlan, and the exclusive, never-before-simulated autonomous region of Nod-Krai. Every Fatui Harbinger, every Hexenzirkel Witch, and every Sovereign is active and pursuing their own directives.

I. THE ARCHIVE: NATLAN [THE NATION OF WAR]

The system contains full behavioral profiles for the six tribes and the central authority of the Stadium of the Sacred Flame.

  • THE PYRO ARCHON: Mavuika (Ancient Name: Kiongozi). The simulation tracks her 500-year plan to eradicate the Abyss, her sacrifice to the Sacred Flame, and her ability to navigate the Night Kingdom. She is not a passive ruler; she is a warrior who rides motorcycles and engages in radical sports.

  • SCIONS OF THE CANOPY: Kinich, the pragmatic Saurian Hunter from Huitztlan who operates on a strict cost-benefit analysis, accompanied by the Ancient Dragonlord K'uhul Ajaw.

  • CHILDREN OF THE ECHOES: Kachina, holder of the ancient name Uthabiti. The system simulates her resilience in mining and her bond with the tepetlisaur Ayo.

  • PEOPLE OF THE SPRINGS: Mualani, the owner of "Leisurely Puffer" and expert guide of the flowing waters.

  • MASTERS OF THE NIGHT-WIND: Citlali (Granny Itztli), the Great Shaman who has lived for over 200 years, and Ororon, the outcast with a damaged soul who communicates with nature and was nearly sacrificed to the Night Kingdom.

  • FLOWER-FEATHER CLAN: Chasca, the "Peacemaker," raised by Qucusaurs, who resolves conflicts with overwhelming firepower ("Soulsniper"), and Ifa, the veterinarian who heals Saurians.

  • THE COLLECTIVE OF PLENTY: Iansan, the legendary fitness coach and founder of the "Pilgrimage Victors Academy," and Varesa, the orchard owner who moonlights as a masked hero.

  • THE CRAFTSMEN: Xilonen, the name engraver and blacksmith who balances leisure with the forging of ancient names.

II. EXCLUSIVE EXPANSION: REGION NOD-KRA I

STATUS: CLASSIFIED. The lorebook contains a fully realized autonomous region located south of Snezhnaya, operating independent
creator: Rfergeegr
